title: Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday Ask for Help
description: On pages 16–18, mr. 9 and miss wednesday ask for help as luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line.
scene: Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday Ask for Help. Luffy turns Laboon’s grief into a promise of a future rematch, and the crew receives the Log Pose needed for the Grand Line. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: We'd really rather not keep things hush-hush about everything,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: But "mystery" is our organization's motto.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: And so we absolutely cannot tell you anything more.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Please help us out from the kindness of your hearts...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: don't listen to them. They're nothing but trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well... We ACCI- Dentally broke our log pose,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: But do you still want a ride?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: W-what!? You broke it!? And isn't that ours!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: How dare you try to take advantage of our misfortune when you're JUST AS misfortunate as we are!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh right! I forgot to mention that CroCus here gave us another log pose.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: We beseech your kindness, madam...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Damn this woman! She was toying with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OK.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They can come along if they want.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Alright then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your log should have been recorded by now.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: Is it properly pointing towards a place indicated on the map?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's pointing towards whiskey peak.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: You sure about this, kid? Picking whiskey peak all just because of these ruffians...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: The only place you can choose which route you want to take is here, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: It's fine. If I don't like the route, I can always sail once around and choose a different route.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Pukukukukukuki! Idiotic Pirates...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Bye then, flower gramps.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Thanks for the log pose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: See ya then.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: We're going now, whale!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: BOH! BOH!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: Perhaps they're the pirates we've been waiting for...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: That captain has got quite a mysterious aura about him.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Wednesday
dialogue.text: What do you think, Roger...?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 9 and miss wednesday ask for help. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
